name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Carbon Filenames
notes: This building block detects when a Carbon filename is discovered. First set of names is from Carbon 3.7x, while second set of names is from Carbon 3.8x.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Carbon Filenames on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.File Created, Audit.Object Access Attempt, Audit.Object Access Success

when the event matches LOWER("Filename") in ('asmcerts.rs', 'getcerts.rs', 'miniport.dat', 'msximl.dll', 'a67ncodc.ax', 'b9s3coff.ax', 'bootmisc.sdi', 'qavscr.dat', 'vndkrmn.dic', 'ximarsh.dll', 'c_56743.nls') OR LOWER("Filename") in ('cifrado.xml','encodebase.inf','dsntype.gif', 'asmlang.jpg', 'fsbootfail.dat', 'mkfieldsec.dll', 'preinsta.jpg', 'wkstrend.xml', 'xmlrts.png', 'zcerterror.png') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Carbon Filenames on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.File Created, Audit.Object Access Attempt, Audit.Object Access Success

AND when the event matches LOWER("Filename") in ('asmcerts.rs', 'getcerts.rs', 'miniport.dat', 'msximl.dll', 'a67ncodc.ax', 'b9s3coff.ax', 'bootmisc.sdi', 'qavscr.dat', 'vndkrmn.dic', 'ximarsh.dll', 'c_56743.nls') OR LOWER("Filename") in ('cifrado.xml','encodebase.inf','dsntype.gif', 'asmlang.jpg', 'fsbootfail.dat', 'mkfieldsec.dll', 'preinsta.jpg', 'wkstrend.xml', 'xmlrts.png', 'zcerterror.png') AQL filter query
